Kadir Has University

Faculty of Communication

Kadir Has University Faculty of Communication is an educational institution that aims to provide students with theoretical knowledge and practical skills by offering a strong academic foundation in the field of communication. The faculty develops strong collaborations with the industry by providing dynamic and innovative education to its students through various departments such as Visual Communication Design, Public Relations, Radio-Television and Cinema, and Advertising.
